language_settings.auto_translate.title: Auto-translate posts
language_settings.auto_translate.descrip: When on, posts in another language are translated for you automatically. When off, you'll see a "Translate" button on those posts instead.
language_settings.privacy_notice: Translations are powered by Google Translate. Translating a post sends its text to Google's servers; we don't keep a copy.
feed.empty.all_filtered: No posts to show (some may be hidden by your settings).
post.replying_to_removed: Replying to a post that has been removed by the poster
post.signin.like: Create a profile to like posts.
post.delete_confirm.title: Delete post
post.delete_confirm.message:
This post will be hidden for everyone, but the content of this post already exists on chain forever and can not be removed.

Hiding this post will also be recorded on-chain and cannot be undone.
post.pin_choice.title: Pin to profile
post.pin_choice.description: Pinning on chain makes your choice public and verifiable by any client or indexer. Off-chain only stores it on this server — faster and free, but only this app shows it.
